﻿.. _dp-MediaSLOT1_QuickFormatEnableStatus:

CrDeviceProperty_MediaSLOT1_QuickFormatEnableStatus
===================================================

Get the Media Quick Format Enable Status(SLOT1)

    CrDataType: `CrDataType_UInt8Array`

.. list-table::
  :widths: auto
  :header-rows: 1

  * - Parameter Code
    - Explanation

  * - CrMediaFormat_Disable
    - | Disable

  * - CrMediaFormat_Enable
    - | Enable
